name: Jira
description: Interact with Jira projects. This official Atlassian MCP integration is installable through Cline.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: Streamable HTTP. Auth from source catalog: OAuth 2.1; optional API token. Atlassian Rovo MCP supports Jira, Confluence, and Compass; old SSE endpoint deprecated after 2026-06-30.
